daily.today_energy: The cosmos is giving you that rare clarity energy today. Your vibe is magnetic without trying—people are naturally drawn to your balanced presence. Trust the momentum.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, authenticity is your love language rn. Someone (or yourself) needs to hear the real you today. Let vulnerability be your power move.
daily.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is your moment to speak up in that meeting or pitch what's been brewing. The universe has your back on this one.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding—maybe a walk, some stretching, or just unplugging for a sec. Listen to that inner voice telling you what actually feels good.

weekly.overview: Mercury's moving through your sign this week, Libra—you're basically in your main character era. Your communication is sharp, your vibe is magnetic, and honestly? People are gonna want what you're putting down. Trust the momentum.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, deep conversations are flowing naturally—lean into it. Single? Someone's been noticing you quietly. The energy says be authentically yourself this week; your real self is the most attractive version anyway.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is the week to speak up in meetings, pitch that thing you've been sitting on, or network genuinely. Your natural diplomacy mixed with clarity is basically your superpower atm.
weekly.health: Your energy's asking for balance—not restriction. Move your body in ways that feel good, hydrate like it's your job, and honestly? Rest without guilt. Your vibe thrives when you're not forcing anything.
